profile.name: FRIEZE KERE WANDABWA
profile.title: IT Manager | Enterprise Infrastructure | Cloud Platforms | Cybersecurity Governance

summary: Strategic IT Manager with over 10 years of experience delivering secure and resilient enterprise technology environments across multi-site operations. Proven expertise in aligning IT strategy with business objectives, managing enterprise infrastructure, and leading technology operations supporting over 1,000 users. Skilled in hybrid cloud environments (Azure & AWS), enterprise networking, Microsoft 365 administration, and cybersecurity governance. Recognized for strengthening operational resilience, optimizing vendor relationships, and implementing modern digital platforms that enhance collaboration, productivity, and organizational performance.
keyAchievements: Directed ICT operations supporting 15+ locations and 1,000+ users, maintaining 99.9% infrastructure availability.
Implemented Microsoft 365 and hybrid cloud collaboration platforms, enabling secure and efficient distributed work environments.
Strengthened cybersecurity governance frameworks, reducing infrastructure vulnerabilities and improving enterprise security posture.
Implemented proactive infrastructure monitoring and disaster recovery frameworks, improving incident response and resolution time by 40%.
Optimized IT procurement and vendor contracts, achieving measurable cost efficiencies across enterprise technology operations.
strategicImpact: Directed ICT operations supporting 15+ locations and 1,000+ users, maintaining 99.9% infrastructure availability.

achievements.text: Lead enterprise IT operations across 15 business centers supporting 1,000+ users, maintaining 99.9% system uptime.
Administer Microsoft 365 collaboration platforms including identity governance, MFA enforcement, and secure collaboration tools.
Manage hybrid infrastructure integrating Microsoft Azure and AWS cloud platforms with on-prem enterprise systems.
Strengthen cybersecurity posture through improved access controls, monitoring frameworks, and infrastructure security policies.
Direct IT procurement and vendor negotiations achieving 20% cost optimization across infrastructure services.
Implement monitoring and disaster recovery frameworks improving infrastructure resilience and incident response efficiency.
Act as primary IT liaison with business leadership ensuring technology initiatives align with operational priorities.
Directed enterprise network infrastructure deployments across distributed client environments.
Designed and implemented SD-WAN architecture improving connectivity reliability across multiple sites.
Managed WAN, VPN, routing, and secure connectivity infrastructure for enterprise networks.
Implemented centralized monitoring platforms enabling proactive network fault detection and performance visibility.
Strengthened cybersecurity through firewall governance, network segmentation, and secure connectivity frameworks.
Coordinated infrastructure deployment projects with vendors ensuring solutions aligned with business and technical requirements.

experiences.technologies: SD-WAN, Routing, VPN, Firewall, Network Monitoring

achievements.text: Supported secure ICT infrastructure operations within a national regulatory environment.
Assisted in implementing security controls and governance frameworks aligned with ICT regulatory standards.
Maintained network and system availability through monitoring, troubleshooting, and incident response.
Supported maintenance of aviation communication and surveillance systems.
Assisted infrastructure monitoring and preventive maintenance activities ensuring operational continuity.
